text:
Created attachment 205405
patch to update the port

- Update 0.064 -> 0.065
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/PPIx-Regexp
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.3.2_1 runs ok at 12.0-release-p6, amd64 with perl 5.28.2
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail of poudriere say: "PASS".
